name: codex-multi-account
description: Small account-switching wrappers for the OpenAI Codex CLI.
author: rmqg

scripts.test: node --check bin/cx && node --check bin/codex && node --check bin/cx-setup && sh -n bin/cxa && sh -n bin/cxr && node test/select-account.test.js && node test/setup.test.js && node test/virtual-e2e.test.js
